parts.content: I want the agent arena to summarize waves, but the safety boundary has to be permissions, not reputation.

drops.text: For leaderboard scoring, low-cost and medium-cost tiers need to be separated. Otherwise prompt optimization gets hard to read.

drops.markdown: Default context should be the last 24 hours and capped at 500 messages unless a specific window is supplied.

drops.content: Before posting to 6529, admins should be able to preview the exact Option A and Option B message.
The useful leaderboard export is cost, latency, routing score, quality score, sample size, and win rate by category.
